query: mutation($input: CreateCommitOnBranchInput!) { createCommitOnBranch(input: $input) { commit { oid url messageHeadline } } }

message.headline: fix: handle large scenario editor return payloads
message.body:
- add 1.3.3.3 changelog entry
- store large runtime return payloads in IndexedDB
- load returned scenarios from IndexedDB and reapply after restore
